race.description: Eurell's Narrandera & Yamaha Golf Cars Yarraman Sprint Hcp
race.comment: NARCISSIST (6) found the heavy track at Wagga too testing when second up there just over 5 weeks ago. He is a promising and lightly tried 5YO gelding who only needs a slightly better surface to bounce back to the form that saw him win fresh up at Corowa in May. Stick with him on top. DESTRUCTIVE DIVA (7) has not been too far away in her last 3 starts, and the long run in on this track will suit her. A firmer surface would suit her, and she is not the worst when considering wider combos. DANCEENUFF (8) won a trial before needing the run fresh up at Swan Hill 5 weeks ago. She is much better than that effort suggests, and we are giving her another chance in an even contest like this. BRENLYN'S LEGACY (2) trained off at the end of his last prep. Don't risk him fresh.
